sentences.target: Je loue une voiture pour le week-end.
sentences.reading: /ʒə lu yn vwa.tyʁ puʁ lə wikɛnd/

translations.fr: Je loue une voiture pour le week-end.
translations.ipa: /ʒə lu yn vwa.tyʁ puʁ lə wikɛnd/
translations.en: I'm renting a car for the weekend.
translations.es: Estoy alquilando un coche para el fin de semana.
translations.de: Ich miete ein Auto für das Wochenende.
translations.it: Sto noleggiando un'auto per il fine settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在为周末租一辆车。
translations.pt: Estou alugando um carro para o fim de semana.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thuê một chiếc xe cho cuối tuần.
translations.ar: أنا أستأجر سيارة لعطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ik huur een auto voor het weekend.
translations.hi: मैं सप्ताहांत के लिए एक कार किराए पर ले रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Νοικιάζω ένα αυτοκίνητο για το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Jeg leier en bil for helgen.
translations.id: Saya sedang menyewa mobil untuk akhir pekan.
translations.sv: Jag hyr en bil för helgen.
translations.da: Jeg lejer en bil til weekenden.
translations.ja: 週末に車を借りています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun marking the speaker as the subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular, expressing the action.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Concrete noun, direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a purpose/time complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the time noun.
Borrowed noun functioning as a temporal complement.

sentences.target: Tu loues des skis à la station de ski.
sentences.reading: /ty lu de ski a la stasjɔ̃ də ski/

translations.fr: Tu loues des skis à la station de ski.
translations.ipa: /ty lu de ski a la stasjɔ̃ də ski/
translations.en: You're renting skis at the ski resort.
translations.es: Estás alquilando esquís en la estación de esquí.
translations.it: Stai noleggiando degli sci alla stazione sciistica.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在滑雪场租滑雪板。
translations.ru: Ты арендуешь лыжи на горнолыжном курорте.
translations.pt: Você está alugando esquis na estação de esqui.
translations.vi: Bạn đang thuê bộ trượt tuyết ở khu nghỉ trượt tuyết.
translations.ar: أنت تستأجر زلاجات في منتجع التزلج.
translations.nl: Je huurt ski's in het skigebied.
translations.uk: Ти орендуєш лижі на гірськолижному курорті.
translations.hi: तुम स्की रिसॉर्ट में स्की किराए पर ले रहे हो.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menyewa ski di resor ski.
translations.ro: Închiriezi schiuri la stațiunea de schi.
translations.cs: Půjčuješ si lyže v lyžařském středisku.
translations.ja: スキー場でスキーを借りています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Indefinite plural article introducing the direct object.
Plural concrete noun, direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the location noun.
Noun denoting the place; head of the prepositional phrase.
Preposition linking 'station' to the noun complement.
Noun complement specifying the type of station.

sentences.target: On veut louer un petit appartement.

translations.fr: On veut louer un petit appartement.
translations.en: We want to rent a small apartment.
translations.de: Wir wollen eine kleine Wohnung mieten.
translations.yue: 我哋想租一間細嘅公寓。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn thuê một căn hộ nhỏ.
translations.nl: We willen een klein appartement huren.
translations.hi: हम एक छोटा अपार्टमेंट किराए पर लेना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να νοικιάσουμε ένα μικρό διαμέρισμα.
translations.nb: Vi vil leie en liten leilighet.
translations.sv: Vi vill hyra en liten lägenhet.
translations.ro: Vrem să închiriem un apartament mic.
translations.da: Vi vil leje en lille lejlighed.
translations.ja: 小さいアパートを借りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun, 3rd person singular in form.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular, expressing desire.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'veut'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the object.
Attributive adjective modifying 'appartement'.
Concrete noun, direct object of the infinitive 'louer'.

sentences.target: Ils louent des vélos près du parc.
sentences.reading: /il lu de velo pʁɛ dy paʁk/

translations.fr: Ils louent des vélos près du parc.
translations.ipa: /il lu de velo pʁɛ dy paʁk/
translations.en: They rent bikes near the park.
translations.es: Están alquilando bicicletas cerca del parque.
translations.de: Sie leihen Fahrräder in der Nähe des Parks.
translations.it: Stanno noleggiando biciclette vicino al parco.
translations.ko: 그들은 공원 근처에서 자전거를 빌리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在公园附近租自行车。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺公園附近租單車。
translations.ru: Они берут напрокат велосипеды возле парка.
translations.pt: Eles estão alugando bicicletas perto do parque.
translations.vi: Họ đang thuê xe đạp gần công viên.
translations.ar: هم يستأجرون دراجات بالقرب من الحديقة.
translations.nl: Ze huren fietsen in de buurt van het park.
translations.hi: वे पार्क के पास साइकिल किराए पर ले रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oni wypożyczają rowery w pobliżu parku.
translations.nb: De leier sykler i nærheten av parken.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menyewa sepeda di dekat taman.
translations.sv: De hyr cyklar i närheten av parken.
translations.da: De lejer cykler i nærheden af parken.
translations.ja: 彼らは公園の近くで自転車を借りています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Indefinite plural article introducing the direct object.
Plural concrete noun, direct object of the verb.
Head of a complex preposition 'près de', indicating proximity.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le', marking the complement of 'près'.
Noun, object of the preposition, specifying the location.
